name: tasks.create
description: Create a task in Parawi/MyOS using the existing task system. Parses a title and optional due date from your message. Use for reminders, follow-ups, and to-dos.

message.description: Natural language task description, e.g. 'create a task to follow up with the recruiter at Leidos tomorrow'

whenToUse: Osman says to remind him, add a to-do, or follow up on something.
Osman gives a task with a date or deadline attached.
A conversation produces a clear next action worth tracking.
whenNotToUse: Do not use to send email or take any external action. Those are their own skills.
Do not use to fabricate a due date. If none is given, leave it empty.
examples: create a task to follow up with the Leidos recruiter tomorrow
remind me to submit my timesheet by Friday
add a task: review the job offer from Amazon
todo: apply to the GRC analyst role at Booz Allen
